data.title: Market Sentiment Turns Bearish as Funding Rates Shift
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass indicates that the funding rates on major centralized and decentralized exchanges have shifted, signaling a bearish market sentiment. The funding rates for key cryptocurrencies are detailed in the accompanying chart.

Funding rates are fees set by cryptocurrency trading platforms to maintain the balance between contract prices and the prices of the underlying assets, typically applied to perpetual contracts. This mechanism facilitates the exchange of funds between long and short traders, without the trading platform collecting these fees. The purpose is to adjust the cost or profit of holding contracts, ensuring that contract prices remain close to the underlying asset prices.

A funding rate of 0.01% is considered the baseline rate. When the funding rate exceeds 0.01%, it indicates a generally bullish market sentiment. Conversely, when the funding rate falls below 0.005%, it suggests a bearish market outlook.

data.title: ZachXBT: A scammer impersonated a victim of the Trust Wallet hack to lure people into interacting with him.
data.description: Chain detective ZachXBT posted on the X platform that an account claiming to be a victim of a hacking attack has appeared in the community but is actually a scammer. This account attracts attention by posing as a woman and falsely claiming to be a victim of the Trust Wallet hack. The account exhibits several suspicious behaviors: changing its username 44 times, participating in multiple memecoin scams, and having only posted 234 messages since its creation in 2023. Furthermore, ZachXBT has been pre-blocked.

data.title: Moody's: Fed rate cuts are expected next year, but patience is needed.
data.description: Moody's chief economist warned that while multiple interest rate cuts are possible in 2026, this is not a sign of prosperity, but rather a sign that the economy is caught in a "fragile equilibrium." This unusual combination points to a gradual, cautious interest rate path rather than an aggressive rate-cutting cycle. Data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) shows that only 64,000 jobs were added in November 2025, with the agency noting that the "net change" in employment figures since April has been "minimal." (Jinshi)

data.title: Planet Midday News | December 26
data.description: 1. Most crypto markets declined, with the NFT sector falling over 7%, while only the AI ​​and SocialFi sectors remained relatively resilient; 2. PeckShield: The TrustWallet hack has resulted in the theft of over $6 million, of which over $4 million has been transferred to exchanges; 3. SlowMist CISO: The devices or code repositories of Trust Wallet developers may have been compromised by attackers; 4. Uniswap's "proposal to activate fee switches" has been approved, and the v2 and v3 fee switches will be activated on Unichain; 5. A whale that had been dormant for 3 years withdrew 181 BTC, worth $15.8 million, from Binance; 6. Data: Last month's prediction market trading volume exceeded $13 billion, setting a new record; 7. CZ: Trust Wallet will fully cover the $7 million loss caused by the hack; 8. Lithuania will strictly investigate unlicensed crypto companies starting January 1, 2026; 9. Upbit will launch YB spot trading; 10. Machi Dage's account turned a profit this week, with contract profits returning to positive territory.

data.title: Brother Machi's account turned a profit during the week, with contract profits turning positive.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that Brother Machi turned a profit in the past week, with his weekly total PnL for contracts turning positive, recording a profit of approximately $214,800, with a win rate of 80%. His current total account assets are approximately $1.25 million, and he currently holds long contracts on ETH with 25x leverage and long contracts on HYPE with 10x leverage, with a total contract value of approximately $24.72 million. Although individual positions still show unrealized losses, the overall curve has clearly recovered within the week.

data.title: Uniswap Governance Approves UNIfication Proposal in Near-Unanimous Vote
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/uniswap-governance-approves-unification-proposal-in-near-unanimous-vote/

data.title: Following the news of a new product launch on Upbit, YB briefly surged above 0.47 USDT, with a 24-hour increase exceeding 11%.
data.description: Market data shows that the YB/USDT exchange rate experienced a rapid surge in a short period, with the price jumping from approximately 0.38 USDT to 0.47 USDT, reaching a 24-hour high of 0.4700 USDT. The current price is around 0.43 USDT, representing a 24-hour increase of approximately 11.4%. Trading volume also increased significantly, with approximately 1.457 million YB traded in the past 24 hours, amounting to approximately 610,000 USDT.

data.title: Uniswap governance passes major ‘UNIfication’ proposal; 100 million token burn imminent
data.description:

source: https://www.theblock.co/post/383742/uniswap-passes-unification-proposal?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
